title: eumorphia prostrata
intro: Eumorphia prostrata, also known as the Australian strangle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Australian Aboriginal medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments. The plant is said to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. Eumorphia prostrata can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions or decoctions, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
